cmd_quit_guard:
Quitting already, adventurer...coward?
 [1] Yes, I give up
 [2] No! I can do this!
cmd_help:
Commands:
  go [north|south|east|west]   Move
  n / s / e / w                Shortcut directions
  look  (l)                    Describe current room
  inventory  (i)               Show items
  status                       Show character sheet
  help  (?)                    Show this help
  quit  (q)                    Exit
status_level_up: вљЎ LEVEL UP! Now level %d! (HP: %d, ATK: %d)
status_sheet:
=== CHARACTER SHEET ===
Name   : %s
Class  : %s
Level  : %d (XP: %d/%d)
HP     : %d / %d
Attack : %d
Gold   : %d
Items  : %s
=======================
game_over: You have fallen in the dungeon. GAME OVER.
game_win: YOU WIN! Final score: Level %d | Gold %d
combat_potion_used: You drink a potion and recover 30 HP! (HP: %d/%d)
shop_no_items_to_sell: You don't have any items to sell!
room_entrance_desc: You stand at the threshold of darkness. A rusted iron gate hangs ajar, its hinges weeping with age. Cold air seeps from the corridor ahead, carrying the faint stench of rot and old blood. Whatever lies within... it is waiting.
room_corridor_desc: Torches long extinguished line the walls, their sconces caked with black soot. Your footsteps echo unnervingly вЂ” yet something else echoes back, just a half-beat too late. The shadows here are not empty.
room_armory_desc: Weapon racks lie toppled and ransacked, their blades long since claimed by rust or fleeing soldiers. A tattered banner bearing a forgotten crest sags from the ceiling. Someone left in a great hurry вЂ” and did not return.
room_crypt_desc: Stone sarcophagi line the walls like sleeping sentinels, their carved faces worn to featureless ovals by centuries of damp. Latin inscriptions warn of things best left undisturbed. One lid has been pushed aside вЂ” from the inside.
room_altar_desc: A black stone altar dominates the chamber, still stained with sacrifices older than memory. Candles of dark wax burn without flame, casting a cold violet light. The air itself feels wrong here вЂ” thick, watchful, hungry.
room_boss_chamber_desc: The ceiling disappears into darkness above a cathedral of bones. Treasure glints beneath centuries of ash. Then вЂ” a sound like a furnace door opening вЂ” and two amber eyes, each the size of a shield, slide open in the dark.
room_shop_desc: Wedged improbably between crumbling dungeon walls is a cluttered merchant stall, lit by a cheerful lantern. A stout dwarf with a braided beard eyes you from behind a counter of peculiar wares. 'Coin talks, adventurer. Everything else walks.'
